member.name: M:PrivateApi.Controllers.DisasterController.ListAll(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: List all disasters regardless of status (admin/moderator only).

member.name: M:PrivateApi.Controllers.DisasterController.ListMine(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: List disasters submitted by the current user (any status).

member.name: M:PrivateApi.Controllers.DisasterController.Reject(System.String,PrivateApi.Controllers.DisasterController.RejectRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reject a pending disaster with a reason (admin/moderator only).

member.name: M:PrivateApi.Controllers.DisasterController.GetDisaster(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get a single disaster by slug. Pending/rejected visible only to admin/moderator/submitter.

member.name: M:PrivateApi.Controllers.DisasterController.CreateDisaster(PrivateApi.Controllers.DisasterController.CreateDisasterRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Create a new disaster (multipart: title, description, location, severity, photos[]).

member.name: M:PrivateApi.Controllers.DisasterController.UpdateDisaster(System.String,PrivateApi.Controllers.DisasterController.UpdateDisasterRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Update an existing disaster by slug.

member.name: M:PrivateApi.Controllers.DisasterController.DeleteDisaster(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Delete a disaster by slug. Submitter can delete own pending submission; admin/moderator can delete anytime.

member.name: T:PrivateApi.Controllers.ResourceController
member.summary: Admin endpoints for disaster resources (by item type).

member.name: M:PrivateApi.Controllers.ResourceController.GetResources(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: List all resources for a disaster.

member.name: M:PrivateApi.Controllers.ResourceController.Upsert(System.String,System.String,PrivateApi.Controllers.ResourceController.UpsertResourceRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Set the quantity for an item type on a disaster (upsert).

member.name: M:PrivateApi.Controllers.ResourceController.Delete(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Delete an item-type entry from a disaster.
